title: Document adversarial-project command
goal: Add user-facing docs for adversarial-project — a docs/ page plus a README pointer, a 'mini --help' entry, and make 'mini doctor' recognize/count the command — keeping it manual-only (no auto/heuristic wiring).

steps.title: Non-interactive page: mini adversarial
steps.detail: Create docs/non-interactive/adversarial.md following the verify.md template (Synopsis, Description, Example, Notes, Related); link to the interactive sibling and to findings/do/done.

steps.title: Non-interactive page: mini adversarial-project
steps.detail: Create docs/non-interactive/adversarial-project.md; document the actual range flags (--from-phase/--to-phase, --from/--to, genesis fallback) verified against the CLI, no invented options; cross-link sibling + findings.

steps.title: Interactive pages: both slash commands
steps.detail: Create docs/interactive/adversarial.md and docs/interactive/adversarial-project.md per the interactive verify.md template; cross-link the CLI variants and related commands.

steps.title: Add review commands to docs/README.md
steps.detail: Add rows/section for adversarial + adversarial-project (both variants) in the command-reference tables, near the existing mini findings row.

steps.title: Redirect findings.md adversarial link
steps.detail: In docs/non-interactive/findings.md change the adversarial-review link from ../adversarial-task.md (Czech spec) to the new non-interactive/adversarial.md reference page.

steps.title: Verify no code touched + links resolve
steps.detail: Confirm mini --help, COMMAND_DEFS and doctor are unchanged (already done); check all new/edited docs links point to existing files; run typecheck/tests to confirm nothing broke.

resolvedVerify: Read the four new doc pages for tone/accuracy
